other_observers: none; I found the bird, and was the only one who saw it.
duration: 3 minutes until it flew into the Pueblo Zoo
description: When I looked up to see what was chipping in the sycamore tree, I noticed this Northern Parula. The reason I'm submitting this sighting, is because of the rare winter date. See photos taken on December 5, 2012, the only day I saw this bird.Behaviors: Staying high up in the sycamore tree.Call: heard a warbler chip, which didn't sound like the Yellow-throated or Pine Warbler, that had been around.Plumage: unknown
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
